_comment: Config for scripts/check_localization.py. 'required_locales' are the shipping languages every user-facing String Catalog key must be translated into (English is the source language and is implicit). 'allow_untranslated' lists keys that are intentionally identical to the source in every language (pure punctuation, format separators, the brand name) — Xcode shows them as untranslated, but they need no translation. Prefer setting "shouldTranslate": false on such a key in Xcode; use this list when that is impractical. Key each entry by the repo-relative path of the .xcstrings file.
